text.tspan: Anyone contemplating majoring or minoring in computer
science at Pomona should take Pomona CS courses, and
not courses from the other colleges.
The example schedule is not necessarily typical, and is only
meant to show why it is important to declare your major by
the end of your sophomore year.
Please declare your major before the end of your sophomore
year. You can declare your major after completing (or while
